results.title: Rokita seeks execution date for Vanderburgh County child killer
results.description: HENDERSON, Ky. (WEHT) - Indiana Attorney General Todd Rokita filed a motion with the Indiana Supreme Court on Wednesday seeking an execution date for a man convicted for the murder of two children in Vanderburgh County. Jeffrey Weisheit was convicted in 2012 for the murders of 5-year-old Caleb Lynch and 7-year-old Alyssa Lynch in 2010. [...]

results.title: Henrique Schmaiske and the human work behind Meteor 3.0
results.description: Meteor.js is one of those open-source projects developers have lived with for years. It has over 44,800 GitHub stars, more than 500,000 active installations worldwide, and still sits inside products across many countries.
